dataset_meta.name: Hydric Bill Complaints – Historical Backlog
dataset_meta.description: Synthetic dataset of 1 000 customer complaints related to water/hydric billing, provider switches, account transfers, meter errors and related issues. Intended as knowledge base for an AI complaint-handling agent.

categories.wrong_amount_undercharge_reversal: Wrong Amount – Unexpected Reversal / Catch-up Bill
categories.wrong_invoice_wrong_address: Wrong Invoice – Sent to Wrong Address
categories.provider_switch_error_incomplete: Provider Switch – Error or Incomplete Transfer

fields.customer: Customer details (id, name, email, phone, address)
fields.assigned_agent: Agent ID handling the complaint (null if unassigned)
fields.complaint_text: Free-text complaint as submitted by the customer
fields.resolution_hint: Structured summary of the issue for agent context
fields.resolution_notes: How the complaint was resolved (null if still open)
fields.financials: billed, expected, disputed amounts and currency
fields.related_invoice_ids: Invoice numbers referenced in the complaint

dataset_meta.notes: Locations italianised; all complaints set to status=closed with resolution_notes populated.
